name: camellia-plugins
description: Personal plugin marketplace for Claude Code

plugins.name: sdd-kit
plugins.description: SDD workflow + brainstorm/map boundary routing + Trellis-like child package materialization + serial map.json coordination + deterministic .arbor executable packages + Karpathy-style persistent wiki. Skills: research / map / brainstorm / task / impl / review / wiki. Skill-first, no fixed agents. Phases independent; user controls transitions.
